title: GYAKORLATI ESZKÖZ A MEZŐGAZDASÁGI EGÉSZSÉGÜGYI HATÁRVONALAK HATÉKONYSÁGÁNAK FELMÉRÉSÉRE
description: Provides a practical tool for evaluating the effectiveness of agricultural health biosecurity boundaries through serological monitoring using commercial ELISA panels. It outlines a sampling and analysis protocol to determine seroprevalence in poultry flocks and guide targeted biosecurity and vaccination interventions to optimize production efficiency.
